heading: nGram
body:
The `nGram` tokenizer tokenizes into text chunks, or "n-grams", of
given sizes. You can't use a custom analyzer with [nGram](nGram-tokenizer-ref) tokenizer in the `analyzer` field for
[Synonym](synonyms-ref) or [tokenization](bson-data-types-autocomplete) [Define Field Mappings](fts-field-mappings).
